ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "name" TEXT /* The name of the package file, with .zip appended if omitted */,
  "compression_level" INTEGER /* The level of compression to use (0-9) */,
  "always_generate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the package should always be generated */,
  "flatten" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file structure should be included */,
  "single" INTEGER /* Indicates if only the main list of packages should be generated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this package belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the package */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the package was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the package */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "version_control" INTEGER /* Indicates if version control is enabled for the package */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and searchability */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies for the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the package is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package generated by the build */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the build was executed */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Unique build number within the package */,
  "triggered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the build */,
  "build_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the build process in seconds */,
  "build_log" TEXT /* Detailed logs of the build process */,
  "ci_cd_pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CI/CD pipeline associated with the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_triggered_by FOREIGN KEY ("triggered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the package management system (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., informational, warning, error) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the environment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the environment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package that was deployed */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the package was deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the deployment occurred */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the package */,
  "deployment_log" TEXT /* Detailed logs of the deployment process */,
  "rollback_possible" INTEGER /* Indicates if a rollback is possible for this deployment */,
  "rollback_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for rolling back the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Document changes made in this version */,
  "compatible_environments" TEXT /* List of environments where this version is compatible */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies for this version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., build, deployment, error) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., build, deployment) */,
  "action_url" TEXT /* URL for taking action on the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
